Backend Engineer — Rust / Elixir Platform

About the role
We build our high-throughput trading platform in Rust and Elixir. You will write
low-latency services and own concurrency-heavy subsystems.

Required qualifications
- 3+ years writing production Rust (ownership, async/tokio).
- Strong Elixir/OTP experience: GenServers, supervision trees, BEAM tuning.
- Backend fundamentals: APIs, databases, Linux.
- Experience with high-concurrency, low-latency systems.

Nice to have
- Phoenix framework.
- Experience with distributed consensus.
